programme.title: The Orient Express: A Golden Era of Travel
programme.desc: All aboard for an opulent ride through the history of the Orient Express. The train rolls out of Paris and there's a trip to the Moulin Rouge.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on strong women who are in A&E with a range of problems. Georgia, who's 19, has fallen 20 feet while trying to climb through the window of her flat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets families with strong bonds forged through adversity. Retired doctor Patrick is brought to St George's after falling from his horse and being dragged 40 metres.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A freak car accident in Cumbria leaves Richard fighting for his life. In Hampshire, horse rider Pat takes a nasty fall when her animal is spooked.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on strong women who are in A&E with a range of problems. Georgia, who's 19, has fallen 20 feet while trying to climb through the window of her flat.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets families with strong bonds forged through adversity. Retired doctor Patrick is brought to St George's after falling from his horse and being dragged 40 metres.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Kate Quilton heads to Spain in pursuit of the perfect tomato. What's the difference between risotto rice and long grain? And why aren't pork scratchings made from British pigs.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole visit Witney in Oxfordshire, where Henry discovers a tractor that hasn't run for years - but it's no problem for restorer Alan, the mechanical medic.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Tiverton, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien meet petrolhead Roger. Henry turns part of a tornado jet into a table, while Simon transforms a pair of exhaust pipes into trendy lamps.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their rivals to Centery Farm in north Devon. Their sheep-herding activity is hit by rain and fog, so the group herd ducks instead.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where owner and professional chef Ben Cooke shows his guests how to make gravlax and the vodka-based shot akvavit.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen hosts at his four-star Old Hall House, where the on-site activities include shooting and archery. And guest Sandie makes a surprising revelation to the group.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the competition is to The House of Agnes in Canterbury, run by ex-hotel inspector Sandie. But could Sandie's former job backfire on her.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for one last time to find out how much they've been paid. Only one establishment can take the title of best value for money B&B. Who will it be.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drinks brand ambassador Dan serves up classic Greek grub, while some of his guests struggle to get a word in..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Computer fanatic Matt hosts the second night, with culinary cock-ups, revelations of scoffing sofas, and sumo shenanigans on the menu.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog walking entrepreneur Jordanna hosts a Mexican-themed evening featuring culinary compliments, offers of feet-kissing and some unwanted guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jayne - the self-proclaimed number one florist in Hull - gives her guests a taste of Spain with her food, flamenco and fiesta. Tony comes dressed as a matador.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition moves to Doncaster, where Tony serves up some countryside cuisine on a final night featuring hit-and-miss food, dirty cutlery and a wolf-whistling hoo-ha.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julie Janes and Yvonne Quinsey hope to impress their guests at their African-themed Foxholm B&B in North Yorkshire. Things start harmoniously but soon descend into chaos.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wendy Johnson and John Shields welcome their rivals to their American diner-themed B&B, the Pack Horse, in Lincolnshire, where the guests enjoy an afternoon of horse riding.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Glenwalden B&B in Blackpool, hosts Steve and Sigrid take their guests ballroom dancing, but there are suspicions of tactical behaviour and accusations of back-stabbing.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In London, Phil Spencer catches up with Krystle and Sam, who wanted a fun party pad near the river, and Jason and Jaye, who found Clapham beyond their budget.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: In Albrighton, we revisit Jamie Lea and Curtis, who were torn over their menace of a terrace. Did Kirstie create some much-needed space, or did Phil find it elsewhere.

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Stains: Blanca investigates a student's death in a case linked to corporate corruption. Nanni's behaviour becomes increasingly concerning. In Italian/subs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets patients and families looking to the future rather than dwelling on the past. Scott, who was diagnosed with schizophrenia as a teenager, has badly cut his knee.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode focuses on caring and kindness, from family, friends and hospital staff. Sam, who's 13, has come off her bike at high speed during a race and landed on her head.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In County Durham, heli-medics battle to keep Mick alive after he has a seizure. In the Yorkshire Dales, there's a dramatic hillside rescue for a seriously injured paraglider.

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode meets patients and families looking to the future rather than dwelling on the past. Scott, who was diagnosed with schizophrenia as a teenager, has badly cut his knee.

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty looks at how squid and chips could become our national dish. Kate Quilton reports on kangaroo meat. Matt Tebbutt investigates pesto.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Discover Must Have Ideas: Shopping
programme.desc: Discover the very latest must-haves for your home and garden with Must Have Ideas.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tony and Chris welcome their rivals to the Sea Verge Hotel in Paignton on the English Riviera, but their home comforts aren't to everyone's taste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mum and daughter Christine and Jenna host at The Portcullis Hotel in Chipping Sodbury. But the pub's late-night karaoke parties leave their guests feeling grumpy.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's all about Bali, boasting and boxing at Andy Scott's Orchid Hotel in Bournemouth, as the gloves come off and things get physical and flirty.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Richard and Kelly Bailey host at their five-star B&B, Orles Barn, in Ross-on-Wye. The luxury rooms leave a lasting impression, and even picky Christine struggles to find fault.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It's the final day and the B&Bers meet for the last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid, before the winner is announced.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Nick and Tim find their dream holiday home from home on Gran Canaria, to escape the chilly British winters. With a budget of £250k, will they find the perfect place.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lindsay and Ian long for a holiday home where they can spend quality time together, in western Almería in Spain. Laura Hamilton shows them five great options for their £60k budget.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Louise and Chris would love a holiday home near Manilva in southern Spain for extended breaks away. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect match for them for their £120k.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth helps Ash and Anila find their dream holiday home in Torrevieja on Spain's Costa Blanca. Can they get the perfect place with a pool for all the family to enjoy for £135,000.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog-mad PA Julie-Ann serves up a surfing theme, with two fish dishes and a surf shack in her garden. There's a shock when glamorous guest Carol reveals her age.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Glamorous grandmother Carol Dolman puts on a dazzling display, on a night featuring saucy discoveries, flirty tango lessons and a wig reveal.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Science teacher and self-confessed geek Damian experiments with a spicy menu and a chemistry demo. But Scott brands his main the worst dish he's ever eaten..

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bartender and self-confessed 'airhead' Steph Barrett hosts a 1940s fancy dress night. But she has to call on her nan to bail her out with a pastry problem.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: International DJ Scott Langley hosts with a risky menu and an 'outrageous' dress code. But how will his pigeon main go down with his guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to The Buck Inn in Malham, Yorkshire, run by Karen and Kathryn Souter. But there are pillow problems, and at breakfast, chef Karen is put to the test.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Johnson host at the Smithson Farm glampsite in Reedley Hallows, Lancashire. Some of the guests embrace the great outdoors, but the communal showers dampen their spirits.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Mallard House in Gilling West, North Yorkshire, run by Olivia Skeoch and Teresa Weedon. But the off-site breakfast isn't to everyone's taste.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Dick and Liz Bradley aim to offer a home-from-home experience at Bryn Derwen B&B in Rhayader, Powys. But the decor disappoints one guest, and there's a frosty atmosphere at breakfast.
